item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for April 24, 2026
item.description: The mystery of a missing violin, family drama in the American Midwest, a galaxy-spanning space opera, and more of today's best book deals

item.title: 14 Book Censorship Posts to Revisit: Book Censorship News, April 24, 2026
item.description: From librarian criminalization bills to evaluating sources when reading and sharing information, catch up with these previous posts.

item.title: The Most Read Books on Goodreads This Week
item.description: Here are the five most read books on Goodreads this week! These are the buzziest books of the moment, from romance to sci-fi.

item.title: Does Your Library Have Its Own Annual Book Lists?
item.description: These two library-produced annual book lists showcase community interest and serve as inspiration for what other libraries can do.

item.title: Horror in the Library: Six Horror Books To Keep You Trapped in the Stacks
item.description: These books will have you looking between the stacks at your library a little bit differently.
